news.t: Three ETFs Poised to Break Out Boosted by Tech, Global Trends

holdings.infoBox: NRSH is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.56%, Sterling Infrastructure at 5.21%, Sanmina at 4.92%, Lam Research at 4.17%, and MYR Group at 4.12%.

overview.description: The Aztlan North America Nearshoring Stock Selection ETF (NRSH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a liquidity-weighted index of North American companies that practice transferring business operations to nearby countries. The fund uses a multi-factor model in selecting industrial real estate and logistics companies. NRSH was launched on Nov 29, 2023 and is issued by Aztlan.
